svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ TRACKING APPROACHES │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
SINGLE OBJECT TRACKING (SOT): MULTI-OBJECT TRACKING (MOT): ───────────────────────────── ────────────────────────────
Given: First frame bounding box Given: Detector running each frame Task: Track that object Task: Associate detections over time
Frame 1 Frame N Frame 1 Frame N ┌─────┐ ┌─────┐ ┌─────┐ ┌─────┐ │[🚗] │ → │ [🚗]│ │[🚗1][🚗2]│ → │[🚗1] [🚗2]│ └─────┘ └─────┘ └─────┘ └─────┘
Methods: KCF, SiamFC, Methods: SORT, DeepSORT, STARK, MixFormer ByteTrack, OC-SORT
TRACKING BY DETECTION: ────────────────────── 1. Run detector on each frame 2. Associate detections across frames using: • IoU (Intersection over Union) • Appearance features (Re-ID) • Motion prediction (Kalman filter)
